content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 14, 2000

Hilda Cantú Montoy
City Attorney, City of Fresno
2600 Fresno Street
Fresno, California 93721-3602

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 000-024

Dear Ms. Montoy:

In February of this year, you wrote the Fair Political Practices Commission requesting advice regarding potential conflicts of interest arising from your role as City Attorney in implementing the 1995 Development Agreement and Land Sale Contract with Community Hospitals of Central California (CHCC), in light of the fact that your husband is a physician who has admitting privileges to two acute care hospitals operated by CHCC.

In mid-March, you agreed by telephone to provide a copy of the agreement under which your husband is provided admitting privileges at two acute care hospitals operated by the CHCC in order to analyze your potential conflicts of interest. To date, we have received no additional information from you. Please provide this agreement, or call me to discuss the matter, prior to September 29, 2000. If you wish to withdraw your request for advice, please send a letter making that request at your earliest convenience. If we do not hear from you by this date, we will consider your request for advice to have been withdrawn.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Mark Krausse
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
